title: MINECRAFT: Icing
description: A small modpack designed to keep the base game, but changes how you interact with the world.
body:
![Minecraft logo with a cursive "Icing" in front of it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1885dca1cbdb3f331340d490f5312f2439b119bf.png)
- Modernizing Minecraft
![What is Icing?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d5eb0d0999b93041ae98e80c68d8bfb6e3eb822.png)
Icing is a modpack for minecraft, crammed into this vanilla-ish experience are a bunch of mods that not only fix minecraft's lacking visuals, but it improves upon them using a carefully curated mod list that has zero sacrifice for performance, and tacks on Iris shaders as well as some shaders I chose to give it a much more modern feel as well, here is a list of some notable mods that fix minecraft and refresh the very _feel_ of the game.
- Iris (Shaders)
- Enhanced Celestials (Blood moons and Harvest moons)
- Leawind's Third Person (Better third person camera)
- Formations Nether/Overworld (Structures)
- King's Better Animations (TOTK/BOTW like animations)
![Resource packs/shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a42d1cff3a2c111777624e2e179f4953e4191a6c.png)
I have decided to include a few Resource packs and Shader packs that can replicate the look & feel of modern games, whether it's a blooming sunset in the distance at a beach, or a cozy interior of a home, make everything look absolutely _**DAZZLING**_.
### Shaders
- Astralex (BSL Based intense shader)
- Solas Shader (Accurate fantasy shader)
- BSL Shaders (Basic shader, tried & true feature filled)
- Complementary Reimagined (Vanilla-ish)
- Complementary Unbound (Detailed)
![Note](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0281faaf8d52546293053c5aca832ec98aad6a7.png)
- We CANT assure quality on java versions above 17.
- This modpack most likely can't run on Macs running an M series processor.
- This pack works best at memory allocations above 8 Gigabytes
- Potato PCs aren't recommended
- A full playthrough hasn't conducted using this pack yet. (Feel free to try)
- If you are a mod dev and you wan't your mod removed from my (obscure) modpack, please contact me on discord @TheEpicAppraiser

_[FA+Objects-v1.0.zip](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions)_
